1→import { render, screen } from "@testing-library/react"
     2→import { describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest"
     3→import { VideoSubmissionPreview } from "@/components/compete/video-submission-preview"
     4→import type { ScoreType, WorkoutScheme } from "@/lib/scoring"
     5→
     6→// Mock lucide-react icons
     7→vi.mock("lucide-react", () => {
     8→	const icon =
     9→		(name: string) =>
    10→		({
    11→			className,
    12→			"aria-hidden": ariaHidden,
    13→		}: {
    14→			className?: string
    15→			"aria-hidden"?: string | boolean
    16→		}) => (
    17→			<span
    18→				data-testid={`icon-${name}`}
    19→				className={className}
    20→				aria-hidden={ariaHidden}
    21→			/>
    22→		)
    23→	return {
    24→		Calendar: icon("calendar"),
    25→		CheckCircle2: icon("check-circle"),
    26→		Clock: icon("clock"),
    27→		Edit3: icon("edit"),
    28→		ExternalLink: icon("external-link"),
    29→		FileText: icon("file-text"),
    30→		Trophy: icon("trophy"),
    31→		Youtube: icon("youtube"),
    32→	}
    33→})
    34→
    35→// Mock YouTube embed components
    36→vi.mock("@/components/compete/youtube-embed", () => ({
    37→	YouTubeEmbed: ({ url, title }: { url: string; title?: string }) => (
    38→		<div data-testid="youtube-embed" data-url={url} data-title={title} />
    39→	),
    40→	isYouTubeUrl: (url: string) => {
    41→		try {
    42→			const parsed = new URL(url)
    43→			return (
    44→				parsed.hostname.includes("youtube.com") ||
    45→				parsed.hostname.includes("youtu.be")
    46→			)
    47→		} catch {
    48→			return false
    49→		}
    50→	},
    51→}))
    52→
    53→// Mock url utility
    54→vi.mock("@/utils/url", () => ({
    55→	isSafeUrl: (url: string) => {
    56→		try {
    57→			const parsed = new URL(url)
    58→			return (
    59→				parsed.protocol === "http:" || parsed.protocol === "https:"
    60→			)
    61→		} catch {
    62→			return false
    63→		}
    64→	},
    65→}))
    66→
    67→const now = new Date("2025-06-15T12:00:00Z")
    68→const earlier = new Date("2025-06-15T10:00:00Z")
    69→
    70→function createDefaultSubmission(
    71→	overrides?: Partial<{
    72→		id: string
    73→		videoUrl: string
    74→		notes: string | null
    75→		submittedAt: Date
    76→		updatedAt: Date
    77→	}>,
    78→) {
    79→	return {
    80→		id: "sub-1",
    81→		videoUrl: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ",
    82→		notes: null,
    83→		submittedAt: earlier,
    84→		updatedAt: earlier,
    85→		...overrides,
    86→	}
    87→}
    88→
    89→function createDefaultWorkout(
    90→	overrides?: Partial<{
    91→		name: string
    92→		scheme: WorkoutScheme
    93→		scoreType: ScoreType | null
    94→		timeCap: number | null

    98→	return {
    99→		name: "Fran",

   108→describe("VideoSubmissionPreview", () => {

   484→				screen.getAllByText("Submission window closes tomorrow")
   485→					.length,
   486→			).toBeGreaterThan(0)
   487→		})
   488→
   489→		it("shows default closed message when canEdit false and no reason", () => {
   490→			render(
   491→				<VideoSubmissionPreview
   492→					submission={createDefaultSubmission()}
   493→					canEdit={false}
   494→				/>,
   495→			)
   496→
   497→			expect(
   498→				screen.getByText("Submission window is closed."),
   499→			).toBeTruthy()
   500→		})
   501→	})
   502→})
   503→

Now I have the full picture. Three fixes needed:

1. **Test file**: `DivisionDescription` needs `position` field — add it to test data
2. **Test file**: `aria-hidden` type needs to be `Booleanish` not `string | boolean`
3. **Calendar**: `rootRef` type mismatch — likely a react-day-picker version issue

Let me fix all three.

content.text:
All three typecheck errors fixed:

1. **`competition-workout-card.test.tsx`** — added missing `position` field to `DivisionDescription` test data
2. **`video-submission-preview.test.tsx`** — changed `aria-hidden` type from `string | boolean` to `boolean | "true" | "false"` (matching `Booleanish`)
3. **`calendar.tsx`** — cast `rootRef` to `React.Ref<HTMLDivElement>` to resolve duplicate `@types/react` ref type mismatch
